generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and preparedness, you know how important it is to have a robust civil defense system. Recent reports show that our current preparedness measures are lagging behind other nations, putting our communities at risk. It's our duty to ensure that we're not caught off guard. Let's strengthen our civil defense programs to protect what matters most. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
